heading: Our Data Sources
description: We combine official government statistics with real-time market data to give you the most accurate benchmark.

adzuna.heading: Adzuna Intelligence
adzuna.body: Our primary source for real-time market shifts. We aggregate data from millions of live job listings to see exactly what employers are offering right now.

ons.heading: ONS (UK Government)
ons.body: Official labour market statistics from the Office for National Statistics (Annual Survey of Hours and Earnings), providing the definitive historical benchmark for UK salaries.

bls.heading: US Bureau of Labour Statistics
bls.body: Comprehensive wage data from the BLS Occupational Employment and Wage Statistics (OEWS) program, ensuring accuracy for our US-based benchmarks.

crowd.heading: Crowdsourced Data
crowd.body: We are building a verified database of anonymous salary submissions from professionals like you to further refine our models.
